title: Admissions by Department, Month of Record
notes: Blue scenario: one clean join and a half-open date-range filter on admit_ts. Counting admissions is robust to open stays, NULLs, and the capacity-0 ward, so no landmine gate applies. The only discipline required is filtering on admit_ts (not the non-chronological admission_id) with a half-open range >= '2024-02-01' AND < '2024-03-01'. A BETWEEN '2024-02-01' AND '2024-02-29' on the TIMESTAMP column silently drops admissions timestamped after midnight on 29 Feb -- the gentle teaching point, not a graded trap. Anti-hardcode (G2) holds: the hidden fixture uses a different seed and scale, so the per-department counts differ from the visible sample.
